description: MDEMG — Multi-Dimensional Emergent Memory Graph. Persistent memory for AI agents with Hebbian learning.
notes: MDEMG requires Docker Desktop for Neo4j.
UxTS plugin is bundled — 'mdemg init' will ask to enable it.
post_install: & "$dir\Install-MDEMG.ps1" -InstallDir "$dir" -Upgrade 2>$null; if (Test-Path "$dir\uxts-module.exe") { $p = "$dir\plugins\uxts-module"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $p | Out-Null; Move-Item "$dir\uxts-module.exe" "$p\uxts-module.exe" -Force; Move-Item "$dir\manifest.json" "$p\manifest.json" -Force }
